description_long: This is a vibrant, modern athletic sneaker featuring a dynamic mix of colors including yellow, teal, black, pink, orange, and white. The upper is constructed from a combination of synthetic mesh and overlays, providing both breathability and structural support. The shoe has a thick, sculpted white sole with black and orange accents, designed for comfort and shock absorption. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with teal laces, and the tongue and collar are padded for added comfort. The design includes bold geometric patterns and color blocking, giving it a striking, urban aesthetic. The overall build suggests it is intended for casual or athletic use in urban environments.
description: A colorful, modern athletic sneaker with geometric patterns, teal laces, and a thick, sculpted sole. The shoe features a mix of synthetic materials and bold color blocking for a striking urban look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the yellow toe, teal and black overlays, and prominent geometric patterns with a white and orange sole.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the orange heel accent, black pull tab, and pink and yellow geometric heel design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying more of the pink and purple overlays, teal and yellow accents, and the sculpted white sole.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the teal laces, padded tongue, and yellow toe cap with black and pink trim.
